titleStmt.title: SII 24.383: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 383. (A.R. No. 74 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, CHANDANA-MAṆḌAPA, TIERS, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of the village Guhapriyam as poliyūṭṭu towards offerings to god at Vasavappa-Nāyakkar-maṇḍapa at Guhapriyam on the day of the death anniversary of Vasavayya-Nāyakkar, by his sons, Periya Rāmappar and Śiṟu Rāmappar. The details of date, Śaka 1448, Vyaya, Paṅguṉi 15, correspond to 1527 A.D., March 12, Tuesday but are not enough for verification.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśakābdam 1000 4 100 4 10 8 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa vyaya varuṣam paṅkuni mātam 10 5 tiyati [ koba] la tippaṇa ṉāyakkar putraṉ vasavaya nāyakkar tiruvaṭi kayil vacavaya nāyakkar putrarkaḷ periyairāmappar ciṟuirāmappar Ivarkaḷ [ pitā vasavay] ya ṉāyakkar tiruvaṭicernta divasattile perumāḷ śrīguhapriyam vacavappa ṉāyakkar maṇṭapattil perumāḷ Eṟi Aruḷi ciṟappu Amutu ceytaruḷa poliū
ṭṭāka Anta guhapriyattil ṉāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nañcai puñcai nattam cet talaittiṭar māvaṭai maravaṭai ṉāṅkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa samastaprāptiyum Ācandrā rkka sthāyiyāka poliūṭṭāka Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu Inta tivasattile vacavappa nāyakkar maṇṭapattile ciṟappu Amutu ceyvittu viṭṭavan viḻukkāṭu nālat toṉṟum kovil kantā
ṭai ṉāyanu tirumāḷikaiyile śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu Aruḷa kuṭukkavum Intappaṭi samarppitteṉ periya Irāmappar ciṉṉa Irāmappar śubhamastu
Digital edition of SII 24.383 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
